description: Korea's only domestic CMP (Chemical Mechanical Planarization) equipment and CMP slurry materials manufacturer. Successfully localized CMP equipment that was previously import-dependent. Products: CMP equipment (VENTUS CMP System), wet cleaning systems, display equipment (Wet Station, APP, Coater), and CMP slurry materials (ceria, silica). Spun off from KC Corp in 2017 for semiconductor/display equipment business. Listed on KOSPI.

majorClients: Samsung Electronics (CMP-0018) - CMP equipment, slurry (new VENTUS system under qualification)
SK Hynix (CMP-0020) - CMP equipment, cleaning systems, slurry
competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - direct CMP equipment competitor (ChaMP series vs VENTUS)
Applied Materials - global CMP equipment leader
_externalRelationships.notes: Market cap: 982.8B KRW. Korea's only domestic CMP equipment maker - directly competes with Accretech's ChaMP CMP systems. 2025 Q3 cumulative: revenue +12.7% YoY, operating profit +57.0%. FY2025 estimated revenue: 386B KRW, operating profit: 50B KRW. New VENTUS CMP system completed development, Samsung qualification testing underway - expected supply confirmation within 1 year. Proprietary ceria-based CMP slurry is highly regarded. Considering overseas manufacturing base. Key beneficiary of semiconductor equipment localization (국산화) policy.

_metadata.dataSource: FnGuide, KCTech IR, WorldFolio, Infostockdaily, DB Financial, Pinpoint News
